description_long: This nightstand features a rectangular structure with a light-colored painted body and a contrasting wood-textured top. The front side includes a single upper drawer with a decorative knob and a lower cabinet door, also with a matching knob, both framed with subtle molding details. The sides and back are plain, with the sides featuring recessed paneling for added visual interest. The legs are short and slightly tapered, providing stability and a classic look. The overall design is simple yet elegant, with a focus on functionality and understated style. The nightstand is likely constructed from wood, with metal hardware for the handles.
description: A light-painted wooden nightstand with a wood-textured top, one drawer, a lower cabinet door, and decorative knobs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the drawer, cabinet door, and two decorative knobs.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a recessed panel and the wood-textured top.
description_view_2: Rear view with a plain, unadorned back panel and visible leg structure.
description_view_3: Right side view with a recessed panel matching the left side and the wood-textured top.
attribute_placement_relative_to_other_ur: beside a bed or against a wall
